name: disallowed_unique_constraint_clean
description: ALTER TABLE ADD CONSTRAINT UNIQUE USING INDEX should not trigger SC-MIG14
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id bigint PRIMARY KEY, email text)
query_sql:
-- @name UpdateUsersAttachEmailUniqueIndex
-- @returns :exec
ALTER TABLE users ADD CONSTRAINT users_email_uniq UNIQUE USING INDEX users_email_idx
